REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (1439-1411 South Van Ness Ave, San Francisco Ca 94110)
Off Calendar May-20-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Steven Weinkauf for the San Francisco Public Administrator.

The sale was confirmed at $1,211,588.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale filed 4/23/15. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). No additional bond is required.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Lopes. (Not Reported)
